_description: Successful agent patterns — what works, extracted from pipeline runs

patterns.whatWorks: Performs best on opus with read tools (avg 3.9 calls). FILES_TO_EDIT block format is key to downstream success. High scores when reading real files before designing.

patterns.whatWorks: Scores 9+ when given clear upstream context. list_files helps verify real paths. Fails when security context is complex. Keep output under 3000 words.

patterns.whatWorks: Perfect 10/10 avg. Works with both sonnet and gpt-5.1. 2-3 tool calls optimal (create_file + run_command). First call should be edit/create, not read.

patterns.whatWorks: Perfect 10/10 on opus. 3-4 tool calls. Focused audit tasks score best — narrow scope > broad sweep.
taskExamples: Perform a security audit of /api/system/config route.
Review lib/system-config-storage.ts for insecure file operations. Check path traversal risks and missing input validation.
